displayTitle: The Certificate Proves; the Employer Authorizes
kicker: BASIC // ASNT NDT LEVEL III PROGRAM

beats.narration: Every other credential lives inside the employer's walls. The ASNT Level Three certificate is the rare one that travels with you between jobs.

payload.title: EVIDENCE IS CENTRAL
payload.sub: An outside body examines you; the certificate is yours to carry.

beats.narration: Eligibility trades schooling against field time, but experience never hits zero. More technical education, less required NDT experience comparable to Level Two.
Then two exams. The Basic, taken once, covers this common core; a Method exam, one per endorsement, goes deep at Level Three depth.

chips.s: Once — the core you study now

beats.narration: Here is the point exams love. Passing proves knowledge. It does not let you sign anything until an employer certifies you under its own written practice.

payload.heading: Proof travels; authority is granted
payload.note: ASNT CERTIFICATE = QUALIFICATION EVIDENCE · EMPLOYER DESIGNATION = AUTHORITY TO ACT

beats.narration: Hold the line in your head. The certificate is qualification evidence. The employer's act is authority. The exam tests whether you keep them apart.

payload.sub: Five endorsements still can't sign a procedure until a company makes you its Level III.
